index.title: Umhumushi Wezinsizakusebenza
index.description: Vula izicelo zokudonsa ezihunyushwe ngomshini zamafayela emithombo kunoma iyiphi i-repo, kunoma iyiphi ifomethi.
index.badge: v3.0 - Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.lede: I-Resource Translator ivula izicelo zokudonsa ezihunyushwe ngomshini zamafayela akho emithombo usebenzisa i-Azure AI Translator nge-SDK esemthethweni - azikho izinsizakalo ezengeziwe, nje ukuhamba komsebenzi.
index.workflowTitle: Ukuhumusha njengomsebenzi wokusebenza, hhayi umsebenzi womsebenzi.
index.workflowBody: Phonsa isenzo ku-CI yakho ekhona, uyikhombe ku-Azure AI Translator, futhi uvumele i-repo yakho ikhulume zonke izilimi ozihlosile.

formats.title: Amafomethi wefayela ayisithupha
formats.body: Uhambo olujikelezayo .resx, .xliff, .po, .json, .ini, kanye ne-.restext ngokufometha okuzinzile kwe-byte.

config.title: Ukumiselwa kwezinga le-Repo
config.body: Phonsa i-.github/resource-translator.yml kufaka phakathi ama-globs, ama-glossaries, kanye nezigaba ze-Custom Translator.

glossary.title: I-Glossary-aware
glossary.body: Khiya amagama womkhiqizo nemigomo yomkhiqizo nge-regex ehlakaniphile ephatha i-C ++, .NET, nabangani.

dryRun.title: I-Dry-run + soft-fail
dryRun.body: Buka kuqala izinguqulo ngaphandle kokubhala amafayela, noma uveze wonke amaphutha njengesixwayiso ngenkathi uphinda.

outputs.title: Imiphumela ye-PR-friendly
outputs.body: isifinyezo-isihloko, isifinyezo-imininingwane, futhi has-new-translations slot ngqo ku-create-pull-request.

sdk.title: Official Azure SDK
sdk.body: Yakhelwe ku-@azure-rest / ai-translation-text + @azure / core-rest-pipeline - ukuzama kabusha okuzenzakalelayo ku-408 / 429 / 5xx, ayikho i-HTTP esongwe ngesandla. esbuild-bundled, audit-clean.

getting-started.title: Ukuqala
getting-started.lede: Engeza ifayela lokuhamba komsebenzi, likhombe eziqinisekisweni zakho ze-Azure AI Translator, futhi isenzo - esakhiwe ku-SDK esemthethweni ye-Microsoft ye-@azure-rest / ai-translation-text - sizoskena i-repo yamafayela emithombo yolimi lomthombo futhi sikhiphe izingane zakubo ezihunyushiwe.

provision.title: Ukuhlinzeka umthombo we-Azure AI Translator
provision.body: Yakha umthombo we-Azure AI Translator ku-portal ye-Azure, bese ugcine okulandelayo njengezimfihlo zokugcina i-GitHub ukuze ukuhamba komsebenzi kukwazi ukuzifunda:

resource.title: Yenza ifayela lomthombo
resource.body: Amafayela emithombo asebenzisa igama. <sourceLocale>. <ext> Umhlabano. Isibonelo i-Greetings.en.resx iba yi-Greetings.fr.resx, i-Greetings.de.resx, njll ngemuva kokugijima.

output.title: Hlola okukhiphayo
output.body: Lapho ukuhamba komsebenzi sekuphelile, isenzo siveza imiphumela emithathu ongayifaka encazelweni ye-PR: isifinyezo-isihloko, isifinyezo-imininingwane, kanye nezinguqulo ezintsha. Ibuye ibhale isifinyezo se-Markdown ekhasini lomsebenzi nge-core.summary.

nextSteps.title: Izinyathelo ezilandelayo
nextSteps.recipes: Bheka izindlela zokupheka zama-monorepos, ama-glossaries angokwezifiso, nezigaba ze-Custom Translator.

configuration.title: Ukumiswa
configuration.lede: Veza okuzenzakalelayo kanye ku-.github/resource-translator.yml bese uvumela wonke umsebenzi ukuthi awuzuze ifa. Ukufakwa kwesenzo kuhlale kunqoba lapho kokubili kunikezwa.

inputs.title: Okokufaka nokukhiphayo
inputs.lede: Konke okufakiwe kwamukelwa kufayela lokuzikhethela le-repo config. Lapho zombili lezi ziqephu zisetshenzisiwe, inkinobho yesenzo iyanqoba.

formats.title: Amafomethi wefayela
formats.lede: Amafomethi ayisithupha wezinsizakusebenza ezijikelezayo. Isenzo sifunda ifayela ngalinye lomthombo-wendawo, ihumusha amanani, futhi ibhale umfowabo ngendawo ngayinye ehlosiwe.

recipes.title: Izindlela zokupheka
recipes.lede: Amaphethini ajwayelekile wokuhumusha kokuthumela: ama-monorepos, ama-glossaries, izigaba zangokwezifiso, ukugijima okomile, nokulawulwa kwethoni.

faq.title: Imibuzo
faq.lede: Izimpendulo ezisheshayo zemibuzo evelayo kaningi lapho uthatha isenzo.

translations.title: Ukuhumusha
translations.filterPlaceholder: Sesha ngolimi, ikhodi noma igama lendabuko.

contributing.title: Ukunikela
contributing.lede: Imibiko ye-bug, izicelo zesici, nezicelo zokudonsa konke kwamukelekile. Isenzo sincane ngokwanele ukuba sibe nobungane kubanikeli besikhathi sokuqala.

changelog.title: I-Changelog
changelog.lede: Isifinyezo esiphezulu sokukhishwa. I-canonical, i-changelog enegunya ihlala CHANGELOG.md endaweni yokugcina.
